name: Lisa Mcclain
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $271,330 for Lisa Mcclain in U.S. House, MI-09. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
